name: ai.lumify/sports-intelligence
title: Lumify Sports Intelligence
description: Schedules, scores, odds, splits & explainable AI bet confidence — 8+ sports, free instant key.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Lumify API key as a Bearer token ('Bearer lmfy-...'). Get one free in seconds with no signup at https://lumify.ai/docs/ai, or create an account key at https://lumify.ai/api-keys. The server never stores your key.
